requestedAction: Create one private GitHub repository named ag-test-construction-website and add a starter README only if required by the execution plan.
scope: This approval allows exactly one future live GitHub action: create one private repository named ag-test-construction-website under the owner GitHub account. Starter README creation is allowed only if the execution plan requires it and it contains no credentials, customer data, production data, deployment hooks, private endpoints, live service instructions, or paid-service setup. This approval does not allow Netlify, n8n, deployments, domain or DNS changes, paid services, credentials, production data, customer data, Lead Gen changes, AI Receptionist repository changes, branch creation, pull requests, CI polling, or merges.
revocationPath: This approval expired at 2026-07-04T21:06:41Z and is no longer valid for gated actions. Historical proof remains preserved in the approval, audit, connector execution, and cost records. Any future GitHub repository creation requires a new scoped owner approval lock.

evidence.reference: Current thread owner approval confirmed for PR #57: create actual approval lock for first live GitHub repo creation named ag-test-construction-website.
npm.cmd run validate must pass immediately before execution.
